title: Async/Await & Concurrency
subtitle: TAP, state machines, and threading primitives
description: Async/await is a state machine under the hood — knowing that changes everything. Learn the real cost of async, how to avoid deadlocks, and when to reach for Channels over locks.
learningOutcomes: Explain how async/await compiles to a state machine
Choose between lock, Monitor, Semaphore, and Channel
